title: Comic site content
description: Content for the visual-quickstart-generator engine (build_site.js). This file is the source of truth for every editable word; the engine hard-codes none.

footer_html.description: Footer HTML (raw, inserted as-is - typically a link).

chapters.description: Ordered list of chapters; index 0 -> chapter-00.html, etc.

art.description: Project image-generation config (cast, style, brand/logo, per-image logo placement, recolor rules). Consumed by the art tools (gen2.js, relogo.js, recolor.js, render_logo.js); the site engine ignores it.

style.description: Shared STYLE block prefixed to every generation prompt (art style, palette, reserved top/bottom bands, 'no text').

scene_suffix.description: Phrase appended after the cast in every prompt (e.g. 'Clean composition with proper margins...').

size.description: Generated image size, e.g. '1536x1024' (must match the engine viewBox).

cast.description: Map of character key -> fixed spec paragraph, reused verbatim in every prompt for consistency.

presets.description: Map of preset key (gen2.js's first arg) -> which characters to include + a joining phrase.

characters.description: Cast keys to include, in order.

join.description: Phrase appended after the character specs (e.g. relative sizing notes).

logo.description: Brand logo: asset path, SVG path for render_logo.js, deboss inpaint prompt, skip list, and per-image placement.

asset.description: Logo PNG path relative to the working base (skill or VISUAL_QUICKSTART_BASE).

svg_path.description: SVG path data for render_logo.js to rasterize the white logo.

deboss_prompt.description: Inpaint prompt used by relogo.js clean to remove a baked-in emblem.

down.description: Optional extra vertical nudge applied to every stamped logo.

skip.description: Image basenames to publish with no logo (plain garment).

placements.description: Map of image basename -> { center: [x,y], width } in 1536x1024 pixels.

recolor.description: HSV recolor rules (0-255 scale) used by recolor.js to fix inconsistent paw/garment colors.

out_val.description: [lo,hi] output value range (0-1) across the shading.

targets.description: Map of image basename -> { boxes: [[x0,y0,x1,y1]...], aggressive?: [{box, s_min, v_min, v_max}] }.

site.description: Site-wide chrome text and assets (everything not tied to a specific chapter/panel).

source_base_url.description: Base URL of the course source repo for frame deep links (e.g. a GitHub blob/main root). Omit to disable deep links.

title.description: Browser tab title on the home page.

chapter_title_suffix.description: Appended to each chapter's tab title, e.g. ' - Pip's Comic'.

favicon.description: Favicon path relative to the site root.

avatar.description: Mascot avatar image path shown in the banner.

avatar_alt.description: Alt text for the mascot avatar image.

read_in_course_label.description: Visible text on the caption-row 'Read in course' deep-link pill.

copy_command_label.description: Prefix for terminal copy-button aria-labels, e.g. 'Copy command'.

progress_label.description: Banner progress-bar aria label. {n} and {total} are substituted.

new_tab_label.description: Appended to the book-icon link aria-label to warn it opens a new tab.

copied_label.description: Screen-reader status announced after a terminal command is copied.

close_label.description: Accessible label for modal/dialog close buttons (e.g. 'Close').

quest.description: Home-page quest map + progress dashboard labels. {xp},{n},{done},{total} are substituted where noted.

streak_zero.description: Streak stat shown when the streak is 0.

node_todo.description: Status text for a not-yet-completed chapter node.

node_done.description: Status text for a completed chapter node.

badge_locked_alt.description: Alt/title for a not-yet-earned badge. {n} is substituted with the chapter label.

reset_label.description: Label for the 'reset my progress' control.

reset_confirm.description: Confirmation prompt shown before resetting progress.

certificate.description: Completion-certificate labels (home page). {name},{course},{date} are substituted where noted.

locked_hint.description: Hint shown while the certificate is still locked.

unlocked_heading.description: Heading shown once all chapters are complete.

name_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the name input.

generate_label.description: Button that renders the certificate from the entered name.

print_label.description: Button that prints / saves the certificate as a PDF.

body.description: Line between the name and course, e.g. 'has successfully completed'.

course.description: Course name printed on the certificate.

date_label.description: Label before the completion date. {date} is substituted.

signature.description: Signature line printed on the certificate.

present.description: Presentation / slideshow mode labels (chapter pages). {n} and {total} are substituted where noted.

start_label.description: Label of the button that enters presentation mode.

exit_label.description: Label of the control that exits presentation mode.

next_label.description: Accessible label for the 'next slide' control.

prev_label.description: Accessible label for the 'previous slide' control.

hint.description: Keyboard-hint shown briefly when entering presentation mode.

quizLabels.description: Shared labels for inline knowledge-check (quiz) cards.

correct_prefix.description: Prefix shown when the chosen answer is correct, e.g. 'Correct!'.

incorrect_prefix.description: Prefix shown when the chosen answer is wrong, e.g. 'Not quite.'.

retry_label.description: Hint inviting another attempt after a wrong answer.

answered_label.description: Screen-reader status announced after an answer is chosen.

aria.description: Accessible name for the top nav landmark.

aria_bottom.description: Accessible name for the repeated bottom nav landmark (must differ from 'aria').

home.description: Home page banner and intro frame.

badge.description: Chapter chip text, e.g. 'Chapter 00'. The trailing number drives the progress bar.

subtitle.description: Chapter subtitle shown under the title.

selector.description: One-line description shown in the home chapter picker.

doc.description: Chapter README path under site.source_base_url; gives every frame a default book-icon link.

panels.description: The chapter's comic frames, in order.

panel.description: A single comic frame: a background image plus optional speech bubbles, a terminal bar or details note, a caption, and a deep link.

alt.description: Alt text / aria-label describing the panel image.

caption.description: Frame title shown above the panel: a string, or a list of strings joined with spaces.

terminal.description: Dark terminal-bar command lines. An indented line continues the line above; '  # ...' (two spaces then #) renders as a dimmed comment.

details.description: Light teal-accented note card shown in the bottom strip as an alternative to 'terminal' (use one or the other). Plain prose lines - no terminal styling, comments or copy buttons. Good for explainer text that isn't a command.

file_view.description: Adds a 'view file' pill on the details card that opens a modal dialog showing a real file's contents (read at build time, embedded in the page). Use to let readers see an example artifact (e.g. an agent or skill file) instead of a copy command.

path.description: File to embed, relative to the project root (the folder that contains docs/). Read at build time.

title.description: Dialog heading (defaults to the file's basename).

link.description: Book-icon deep link: a '#anchor' (resolved against the chapter's doc), a path relative to site.source_base_url, an absolute http(s) URL, or false to hide the icon on this frame.

quiz.description: Inline knowledge-check shown below the panel: a question, multiple-choice options and right/wrong feedback. Pure client-side; choosing an answer reveals instant feedback.

prompt.description: The question text (asked by the mascot).

options.description: Answer choices, in order. At least two.

answer.description: Zero-based index of the correct option in 'options'.

correct.description: Explanation shown when the reader answers correctly.

incorrect.description: Explanation/nudge shown when the reader answers incorrectly.

bubble.description: A white speech bubble with a tail that points at the speaker's head.

lines.description: Speech text, one entry per rendered line.

tx.description: Speaker head X (panel px); the tail points here.

ty.description: Speaker head Y (panel px); the tail points here.

x.description: Manual bubble X (panel px). Usually omit and let auto-placement choose.

y.description: Manual bubble Y (panel px). Usually omit and let auto-placement choose.

auto.description: Auto-place the bubble (default true). Set false to force the manual x/y.

delay.description: Optional reveal delay in milliseconds (e.g. 1000, 2000). Sets the bubble's animation-delay inline, overriding any default stagger. Omit to use the engine default.
